prompt: pixel art style snow tile, readable white snow cover on the top face with subtle icy shading and colder bluish snow depth on the side faces
negative_prompt: no scene background, no cast shadow, no extra props, no border, no text, no watermark, no shape deformation
generator_notes: keep the snow surface inside the tile silhouette; no falling snow, no background flakes, no drift spilling outside the cube, preserve the same single-tile framing
